name: Bath Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder into a bowl. Add salt.
2. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in lemon rind, sugar, egg, raisins, and enough milk to form soft dough that can be shaped by hand.
4. Form the dough into a flat sheet about 1 inch thick and cut into rounds or shape small buns.
5. Place a piece of citron on top of each bun.
6. Brush tops with reserved egg wash.
7. Place on an oiled baking sheet.
8. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Brush tops with sugar mixture (1 tablespoon sugar moistened with a little cream).
10. Serve warm.
